The more you share, the better it gets

How TripHunt works

1
We scan 100+ airlines every 15 minutes
Our system watches every major airline's pricing API around the clock. When a price drops 40% or more below the route average, we flag it as an error fare immediately.
2
You get alerted before the internet does
Push notifications hit your phone within 60 seconds of detection. The average error fare lasts 2–4 hours before the airline corrects it. Speed is everything.
3
Click through and book directly with the airline
We never take payment. You book with the airline or OTA directly — same price as going direct. We earn a small affiliate commission at no cost to you.
4
Share the deal and help friends save too
When you find a deal, share it. Each person you bring into TripHunt improves your alert priority — meaning you see deals earlier, and fewer sell out before you get there.
🔔

Get the weekly deal digest

Every Monday: the 5 best deals found last week, the top error fare of the month, and the route with the biggest price drop. Free forever.

No spam. Unsubscribe anytime. We hate inbox clutter as much as you do.
✅ Subscribed! Check your inbox for your first digest.

Real bookings. Real savings. Zero booking fees.

TripHunt compares fares from 100+ airlines. We earn affiliate commission when you book — you always pay the same as booking direct.
